# Graph Report - tokiSync  (2026-05-20)

## Corpus Check
- 142 files · ~168,313 words
- Verdict: corpus is large enough that graph structure adds value.

## Summary
- 2640 nodes · 5987 edges · 162 communities (140 shown, 22 thin omitted)
- Extraction: 98% EXTRACTED · 2% INFERRED · 0% AMBIGUOUS · INFERRED: 136 edges (avg confidence: 0.8)
- Token cost: 0 input · 0 output

## Graph Freshness
- Built from commit: `f42a4c82`
- Run `git rev-parse HEAD` and compare to check if the graph is stale.
- Run `graphify update .` after code changes (no API cost).
